title: Won Ton Ton: The Dog Who Saved Hollywood
original_title: Won Ton Ton: The Dog Who Saved Hollywood
overview: A would-be filmmaker and actress shake up the industry with a trick dog who gets discovered by a studio bus driver in the 1920s.
